title: Is XanaNode a real working stack?
summary: Yes. XanaNode has a protocol, Core SDK, Hugo projection, Workspace layer, and Studio authoring application that work together.
content: XanaNode is not only a design idea. The current stack includes protocol schemas and governance rules, a Core SDK for validation and pack building, Hugo for static public projection, Workspace for local substrate handling, and Studio for desktop authoring. The pieces are versioned so a reader can trace what each part does and why it exists.
